attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Gabriel Gudmundsson (Sweden) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Viktor Gyökeres (Sweden) right footed shot from the centre of the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Yasin Ayari following a fast break.

events.description: 哲凯赖什射门偏出。 亚辛·阿亚里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match (Sweden).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt blocked. Viktor Gyökeres (Sweden) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked.
Handball by Gabriel Gudmundsson (Sweden).

events.description: 加布里埃尔·古德蒙森犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Yasin Ayari (Sweden) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Tunisia. Anis Ben Slimane is caught offside.
Foul by Yasin Ayari (Sweden).
Attempt missed. Elias Saad (Tunisia) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Hannibal Mejbri.

events.description: 埃利亚斯·萨阿德射门偏出。 汉尼拔·梅布里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Gabriel Gudmundsson (Sweden).

events.description: 加布里埃尔·古德蒙森犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 伊萨克 进球，哲凯赖什 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Rani Khedira (Tunisia) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Anis Ben Slimane.

events.description: 拉尼·赫迪拉射门被封堵。 阿尼斯·斯利曼参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Tunisia. Elias Saad is caught offside.
Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Ali Abdi.
Attempt missed. Victor Lindelöf (Sweden) header from the centre of the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Benjamin Nygren with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 维克多·林德洛夫射门偏出。 本杰明·尼格伦参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Mohamed Amine Ben Hmida.
Foul by Benjamin Nygren (Sweden).

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 奥马尔·雷基克 进球，汉尼拔·梅布里 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Alexander Bernhardsson (Sweden) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Sweden 2, Tunisia 1.
Second Half begins Sweden 2, Tunisia 1.
Gabriel Gudmundsson (Sweden) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Sweden. Alexander Isak is caught offside.
Foul by Alexander Isak (Sweden).
Foul by Jesper Karlström (Sweden).

events.description: 杰斯帕·卡尔斯特罗姆犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Hannibal Mejbri (Tunisia) right footed shot from outside the box is too high from a direct free kick.

events.description: 汉尼拔·梅布里射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Viktor Gyökeres (Sweden) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Jesper Karlström.

events.description: 哲凯赖什射门被封堵。 杰斯帕·卡尔斯特罗姆参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Sweden. Alexander Isak is caught offside.
Corner, Tunisia. Conceded by Isak Hien.
Attempt missed. Montassar Talbi (Tunisia) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Hannibal Mejbri with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 蒙塔萨·塔尔比射门偏出。 汉尼拔·梅布里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Sweden. Alexander Isak is caught offside.
Foul by Yan Valery (Tunisia).

events.description: 哲凯赖什 进球，伊萨克 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Tunisia. Conceded by Gabriel Gudmundsson.
Hannibal Mejbri (Tunisia) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 卢卡斯·伯格瓦尔 登场，本杰明·尼格伦 离场
埃利奥特·斯特劳德 登场，加布里埃尔·古德蒙森 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Gabriel Gudmundsson (Sweden).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Viktor Gyökeres (Sweden) right footed shot from the right side of the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Gustaf Lagerbielke.

events.description: 哲凯赖什射门偏出。 古斯塔夫·拉格比尔克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Tunisia. Anis Ben Slimane is caught offside.

塞巴斯蒂安·图内克蒂 登场，埃利亚斯·萨阿德 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Sebastian Tounekti (Tunisia).

events.description: 塞巴斯蒂安·图内克蒂犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Hannibal Mejbri (Tunisia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Hadj Mahmoud.
Handball by Isak Hien (Sweden).
Offside, Tunisia. Elias Achouri is caught offside.
Foul by Ali Abdi (Tunisia).

events.description: 马蒂亚斯·斯万贝里 进球，伊萨克 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: VAR Decision: Goal Sweden 4-1 Tunisia (Mattias Svanberg).
Attempt saved. Alexander Isak (Sweden) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Abdelmouhib Chamakh (Tunisia). Assisted by Viktor Gyökeres.

events.description: 伊萨克射正。 哲凯赖什参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Tunisia. Firas Chaouat is caught offside.

events.description: 卢卡斯·伯格瓦尔射门被封堵。 哲凯赖什参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Mohamed Amine Ben Hmida.
Elias Achouri (Tunisia) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Attempt saved. Elias Achouri (Tunisia) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Kristoffer Nordfeldt (Sweden).
Foul by Ali Abdi (Tunisia).
Offside, Tunisia. Firas Chaouat is caught offside.
